overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's neon-lit downtown streets at night. The journey transitions from covered underpasses to open intersections and commercial districts with futuristic architecture and moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under concrete overpass

events.description: exiting covered overpass into open urban intersection with bright lights ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway toward the illuminated exit ahead

entered.detail: concrete ceiling of the overpass with embedded yellow strip lights
large structural support columns for the overpass
painted yellow lines marking the pedestrian path on the ground

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered concrete walkway beneath an overpass, with yellow safety lines marking the path. The area is dimly lit with artificial lighting, and a few pedestrians walk ahead toward the bright exit visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with massive digital billboard

events.description: exits covered walkway into open intersection dominated by large digital billboard
turns right at the intersection to follow the sidewalk alongside the road

agents.ego_description: navigating through the busy intersection, crossing the street and turning right onto the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: massive illuminated vertical billboard displaying advertisements with bright white and yellow light
marked pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
tall traffic signal posts with illuminated lights
tall futuristic buildings with illuminated windows and signage

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the overpass into a wide-open urban intersection dominated by a massive glowing digital billboard. The area is bustling with pedestrians and sparse vehicle traffic. The character crosses the intersection and turns right onto a sidewalk, passing traffic lights and futuristic multi-story buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk adjacent to concrete retaining wall and staircase

events.description: turns onto narrow sidewalk beside large concrete structure with external staircase
futuristic vehicles including a blue sedan and black car pass by on the adjacent road

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow sidewalk next to a concrete wall, passing a staircase structure and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in yellow plaid shirt walking ahead on the sidewalk
blue futuristic sedan driving along the street

entered.detail: tall concrete wall running alongside the sidewalk with graffiti markings
external concrete staircase attached to the building structure
wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow sidewalk bordered by a concrete retaining wall covered in graffiti. A large external staircase structure is visible on the left. Futuristic vehicles drive past on the right, and the character passes other pedestrians including a person in a distinctive yellow plaid shirt.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway transitioning to commercial district with storefronts

events.description: approaching commercial area with illuminated storefronts and digital signage becoming visible

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway as the environment opens up to reveal commercial buildings and palm trees

entered.detail: brightly lit shop windows and commercial entrances with warm interior lighting
tall palm trees visible against the night sky
illuminated commercial signs and advertisements on buildings

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking under the overpass as the scene transitions toward a commercial district. The concrete wall falls behind to the left while brightly lit storefronts and palm trees become visible ahead. The pavement appears wet, reflecting the neon and street lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial intersection with neon signage and pedestrian crosswalks

events.description: entering busy commercial intersection with bright neon storefronts and crosswalks
waiting at crosswalk as futuristic green sports car passes through intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching the crosswalk, waiting for traffic to clear, then beginning to cross with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic green sports car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: bright neon signs and illuminated advertisements on commercial buildings
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the road

segments.scene_description: The character enters a vibrant commercial intersection filled with neon signage and bright storefronts. After waiting for a futuristic green sports car to pass, the character begins crossing the street at the marked crosswalk, surrounded by other pedestrians and illuminated by the colorful city lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, enclosed underpass into the vibrant, neon-drenched heart of a futuristic commercial district. It begins within a covered concrete walkway marked by yellow safety lines, moving through artificial dimness toward a bright distant exit. As the character emerges from the overpass, the scene opens into a wide urban intersection dominated by a massive glowing digital billboard and bustling pedestrian traffic. The camera then follows the character along a narrow sidewalk bordered by graffiti-covered walls and external staircases, passing futuristic vehicles before the environment shifts again toward a commercial zone with wet, reflective pavement and palm trees. Finally, the journey culminates in a vivid intersection filled with colorful neon signage and bright storefronts, where the character crosses the street behind a sleek green sports car.
